basic_details.job_title: TIFR Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TIFR Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics, B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech in Mechanical / Materials / Nanotechnology
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics OR B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech in Mechanical / Materials / Nanotechnology (No PhD degree holders). Knowledge/experience in hydrogen fuel cells, THz spectroscopy, nanomaterials, membranes, catalysts, and electrochemical characterization essential.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TIFR Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TIFR Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate-I post at TIFR is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Physics or a B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech in Mechanical/Materials/Nanotechnology. PhD degree holders are not eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 27 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 30% HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is clearly mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for TIFR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What specific experience is essential for this role?
faq.answer: Essential knowledge or experience includes hydrogen fuel cells, THz spectroscopy, nanomaterials, membranes, catalysts, and electrochemical characterization.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is this job located in?
faq.answer: The job is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
